prompt: A cute Bulbasaur referenced in the first image waddling in a lush forest, but its bulb is replaced with a giant, fluffy char siu bao referenced in the second image. The bao-bulb is soft and white with a golden-brown baked top, slightly cracked to reveal a hint of savory barbecue pork filling. Vines made of dough extend from the bao-bulb, curling playfully.
prompt_refined: Generate a photorealistic image of a cute Bulbasaur, visually consistent with image 1, waddling through a lush, verdant forest. Its traditional back bulb is replaced by a giant, fluffy char siu bao, inspired by image 2. This bao-bulb is soft, predominantly white, with a golden-brown baked top that is slightly cracked, revealing a hint of savory barbecue pork filling. From the bao-bulb, vines made of dough extend, curling playfully.
objects: Bulbasaur's traditional back bulb (should not be present)
giant, fluffy char siu bao (replacing Bulbasaur's back bulb)
soft, predominantly white char siu bao
golden-brown baked top on the char siu bao
cracked top on the char siu bao
hint of savory barbecue pork filling
dough vines (extending from the char siu bao)
